case_title: LILIAN ELIZABETH PIMENTEL VS. MIGUEL RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED MAY-02-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MIGUEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIMENTEL, LILIAN ELIZABETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MIGUEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PIMENTEL, LILIAN ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE - CORRECTING THE PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS CITY LISTED ON PROOF FROM SAN FRANCISCO **TO DALY CITY, CA** SERVED MAY-02-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MIGUEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF LILIAN ELIZABETH PIMENTAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER ROSARIO DEL PILAR ESPINOSA DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PIMENTEL, LILIAN ELIZABETH RAMIREZ, MIGUEL
